message:
feat: add OpenClaw and Pi-Agent providers, completing CASS parity

OpenClaw: typed JSONL with content block arrays (text, toolCall,
thinking), session root at ~/.openclaw/agents/openclaw/sessions/,
tool call extraction into canonical IR.

Pi-Agent: typed JSONL with session/message/model_change entries,
nested message objects with content blocks, toolResult→tool role
normalization, workspace safe-path directories at ~/.pi/agent/sessions/.

Both providers include readers, writers, and comprehensive unit tests.
All 14 CASS providers are now supported.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,6 +37,8 @@ fn casr_cmd(tmp: &TempDir) -> Command {
         .env("CLAWDBOT_HOME", tmp.path().join("clawdbot"))
         .env("VIBE_HOME", tmp.path().join("vibe"))
         .env("FACTORY_HOME", tmp.path().join("factory"))
+        .env("OPENCLAW_HOME", tmp.path().join("openclaw"))
+        .env("PI_AGENT_HOME", tmp.path().join("pi-agent"))
         .env("XDG_CONFIG_HOME", tmp.path().join("xdg-config"))
         .env("XDG_DATA_HOME", tmp.path().join("xdg-data"))
         // Suppress colored output in tests.
